evidence: "The interplay between them in any situation is a lesson in something that can’t be taught."
"If you loved HP you'll enjoy this first installment of the new franchise."
"Never a dull moment once she falls through to Wonderland and meets Hatter."
"The show is really funny and at times touchingly so."
"It hits the ground running and never disappoints."
"Fun, fast paced, exciting. It has it all."
"The writer and director have made a charming, slightly gritty, today version of the Carrol masterpiece."
"Acting is so good that you come to care for these people."
"Dare I say it-it may be better than the original films."

summary: The user has a strong preference for comedy and adventure genres, enjoying fast-paced narratives with high production quality. They exhibit brand loyalty to specific creators and appreciate emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
